CustomField.description: Formula field. Displays the Household Account's billing address (or legacy Household's mailing address). Read-only; update the Account or Address record to change.
CustomField.formula:
IF(%%%NAMESPACE%%%Organization_Type__c == 'Household Account',
Account.BillingStreet & BR() & Account.BillingCity & IF(ISBLANK(Account.BillingCity), "", ", ") & Account.BillingState & " " & Account.BillingPostalCode & IF(ISBLANK(Account.BillingCountry), "", BR()& Account.BillingCountry),
Household__r.Formula_MailingAddress__c)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The mailing address from this Contact's Household Account. Read-only.
CustomField.label: Household Mailing Address
